item.title: 美國議員：與中脫鉤困難，但必須做！｜美國召開防衛台灣聽證會，稱願與台灣共存亡！｜台灣人對內需要先清除中共協力者｜粉紅特報128期
item.itunes:title: 美國議員：與中脫鉤困難，但必須做！｜美國召開防衛台灣聽證會，稱願與台灣共存亡！｜台灣人對內需要先清除中共協力者｜粉紅特報128期
item.itunes:author: 波特王好帥
item.itunes:summary:
值得閱讀的理由

  • 深入了解美國政界對中國的強硬態度及其背後的邏輯。
  • 掌握美國國會與重要官員在實際行動和聲明上對台灣防衛的承諾與支持方向。
  • 認識中共在台灣的滲透與認知作戰手法，以及台灣內部需要警惕與採取行動的問題。

摘要

美國參議員史考特談美中關係與全球經濟走向

作者介紹美國佛羅里達州參議員瑞克·史考特（Rick Scott）的一場訪談。史考特參議員是對中強硬派，曾任州長並有企業背景。他支持對中國產品課徵高關稅，認為這是保護美國產業並對抗中國不公平貿易手段的方式。他甚至提出法案，旨在防堵中國透過洗產地規避關稅漏洞。

史考特預測全球市場將逐漸形成「壞蛋經濟體」（如中、俄）與「好人經濟體」（民主國家）兩大陣營。他直言避免與中國開戰的唯一方法是削弱其經濟實力。他主張與中國停止貿易，因其屢次欺騙違約，且購買中國商品即是資助其軍力擴張，威脅自由。他強調，台灣不是中國一部分，中共試圖侵略台灣及侵犯他國主權的行為是卑鄙的，與中國脫鉤雖困難，但是必要且無可避免的選擇。

美國國會就防衛台灣召開聽證會

作者接著報導美國國會為討論如何防衛台灣而召開的重要聽證會。會中由具豐富經驗的前高官與將領擔任證人，討論中共可能於2027年武力犯台的因應策略。會中再次澄清聯合國2758號決議並未賦予中共代表台灣的權力。美國將領們強調需建立聯合力量嚇阻中國，並認為美國過去的行動可能引發盟友（包括台灣）的擔憂。他們呼籲美國軍方與國會積極立法，在經濟與外交上支持台灣，並加強軍備。明確傳達美國願與台灣同生共死的信號。

中共的認知作戰與台灣內部挑戰

聽證會同時揭示中共針對台灣的認知作戰。美國官員了解台灣正遭受來自中共的假資訊攻擊，這種攻擊透過收購媒體、建立網軍、散播錯誤訊息來影響輿論，比實體武器更具殺傷力。作者對此感到憂心，並批評部分台灣政客的行為是配合中共意圖孤立台灣的協力者，例如阻擋國防預算、修法提高罷免門檻等。他呼籲台灣人民認清現實，不要再受假訊息蒙蔽，並警惕這些不利於台灣的內部作為。

台灣的應對之道：清除協力者與強化韌性

作者強調，面對外部威脅，台灣自身的努力至關重要。除了提升對中共認知作戰的警覺、不與網軍浪費時間外，最緊迫的任務是透過罷免等方式清除阻礙台灣防衛的政治人物。他認為，台灣必須與美國緊密合作、配合戰略，才能獲得真正的幫助。台灣人民需要共同喚醒危機意識，強化社會的防禦韌性，因為安內才能攘外，確保台灣的生存與未來。

=============

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=86PGOVWJq6E

或用優惠碼 [potterking] 以獲得額外 4 個月 Surfshark 服務！

點連結成為我的Youtube頻道會員：https://goo.gl/MFNUKr

美國議員：與中脫鉤困難，但必須做！

美國國會召開防衛台灣聽證會，稱願與台灣共存亡！

終局之戰前，台灣人對內需先清除中共協力者

item.title: 中共造謠美國支持統一，小粉紅歡欣鼓舞！慘遭美國打臉｜國台辦在台統戰據點？共媒背書沙縣小吃台灣餐廳｜粉紅特報127期
item.itunes:title: 中共造謠美國支持統一，小粉紅歡欣鼓舞！慘遭美國打臉｜國台辦在台統戰據點？共媒背書沙縣小吃台灣餐廳｜粉紅特報127期
item.itunes:author: 波特王好帥
item.itunes:summary:
影片內容摘要：揭穿川普「統一說」謠言


影片開頭，故事講述者針對近期在網路上和小粉紅、部分親中媒體間流傳的謠言進行駁斥。這些謠言聲稱前美國總統川普最近談到「和平統一」。故事講述者指出，甚至連中國的國台辦和一些親中人士也隨之起舞。為了揭穿這個中共的宣傳，影片展示了川普在白宮記者會上的實際發言片段。
故事講述者解釋，這場長達六十分鐘的記者會主要談論的是美中關係和貿易協議，川普全程並未提及台灣。然而，這些人卻將其扭曲為支持兩岸統一。謠言的核心來自川普的一句話：「I think it\'s going to be great for unification and peace.」故事講述者承認，若斷章取義，這句話直譯確實可能被理解為「我認為這對統一與和平來說很棒」。但影片強調，觀看完整片段後可以清楚看到，川普當時是在談論美中貿易，他想表達的是，如果美中在貿易政策、關稅等方面達成共識，將有助於減少衝突風險，促進區域和世界的和平穩定。
故事講述者指出，即使美國國務院和AIT後來也澄清了這段發言，紅色媒體仍堅持扭曲其原意。他表示，川普早在記者會開頭就說過美中協議「可以促進中國和美國之間的和諧」，因此將這句話硬扯上兩岸統一實屬荒謬。故事講述者建議，台灣不該總是處於防守地位，面對中共的造謠，可以以其人之道還治其人之身，反問既然這句話可以被任意解讀，是否也可以解讀為美國支持台灣統一中國、消滅中共、光復中華民國失地？他認為這樣可以讓那些懂英文的小粉紅去質疑他們自己國家的宣傳。

影片內容摘要：分析川普對中策略


在揭穿謠言後，故事講述者進一步分享了他對川普這段發言的看法。他認為，即使拋開被惡意曲解的部分，川普選擇公開說這些話可能是刻意為之。故事講述者判斷，川普及其團隊肯定了解中共「說一套做一套」的本性，特別是過去的經驗（例如第一階段美中貿易協議中，中國承諾額外購買兩千億美元商品與服務但並未兌現）。
故事講述者認為，川普此舉是在「堵死中國的後路」。他藉由公開聲明，向外界表明「我們達成了一項協議」，儘管中國過去曾違約，但他願意再給一次機會。透過這種公開的方式，川普等於是向全世界宣告，如果中國這次再次違背承諾，責任將完全歸咎於中方，中國也難以翻桌或模糊焦點。
故事講述者分析，這項策略將壓力轉嫁到了中國身上。如果中國這次真的履行承諾，那很好；但如果中國再度違約，雖然不意外，但這將加深中國「不可信賴」的國際形象，向全球證明中國是自由市場的敵人。屆時，美國可以藉此聯合歐洲、日本、澳洲等盟友，共同譴責中國的失信行為，並可能重啟或加強關稅戰，協調對華制裁，限制投資和技術出口等。故事講述者認為，這樣等於是讓中共自己證明自己是不可信賴且威脅世界秩序的角色。

影片內容摘要：警惕在台「統戰店」


影片接著轉向另一個主題，故事講述者向觀眾，特別是台灣的朋友們發出警示。他提到，中共國台辦最近突然高調宣傳一家在台灣開幕的餐飲店。憑藉他多年的反共經驗，直覺認為這可能涉及「統戰」意圖。影片展示了相關新聞，強調這不是一般的海外餐飲進駐，而是一家中式小吃店，卻有中共官方記者會和官媒宣傳。
故事講述者表示，無論食物再美味，他個人都不會去光顧這家店。他的擔憂在於，在這裡的消費所得，可能間接資助了中國侵略台灣的行動。他分析，能夠獲得國台辦的背書，這家店極可能與中共存在關聯，即使不是明確的「統戰」組織，也令人擔憂。他進一步聯想，這是否可能成為一個漏洞，讓中國藉由僱用員工等方式，以工作簽證的名義將人員送進台灣，進行「人口洗錢」？
故事講述者認為，如果這些情況發生，這家店就不僅僅是一家普通的統戰店，而是中共在台灣的一個政治據點。同時，這也是在向潛伏在台灣內部的親共勢力發出集合信號。因此，他個人堅決不吃這類由中共背書的店家。影片提到這家店計畫年底前在台灣各地開分店，故事講述者呼籲台灣的朋友們提高警覺，在踏入餐廳前慎重考慮，因為每一次消費的選擇都在影響我們所處世界的未來。

影片內容摘要：線上留言百態


影片的最後部分，故事講述者分享了他在網路上收到的一些奇特留言。他展示的第一則留言來自一名「小粉紅」，留言說「要統就統我願意做人礦」，緊接著又說「你只配拿去做活體摘除」。故事講述者分析，這段話充滿矛盾，如果留言者是反諷，則前半句等於承認了中國人民是中共的「人礦」，後半句則未否認中共進行活摘器官。如果留言者是認真的，故事講述者戲稱其腦袋可能已經被摘取了，否則不會說出如此不合邏輯的話。
接著，故事講述者展示了一則簡短但具侮辱性的留言「asshole」。他以幽默的方式回應，如果對方的詞彙只剩下動物，建議其從動物園重新學習。他反擊說，如果他自己是烏龜，那麼能聽懂烏龜話的留言者豈不也是烏龜，等同於留言者在侮辱自己。
最後，故事講述者揭露了一則明顯是詐騙機器人留下的留言。這則留言以感謝影片為開頭，隨後編造了一段從無家可歸到每週賺取高額收入的虛假故事，目的顯然是為了引誘他人進行投資詐騙。他指出，這類留言常伴隨大量假帳號的回應和點讚，試圖提高其能見度。故事講述者判斷這則留言可能發錯了地方。他藉此例子提醒觀眾，現今網路上存在許多機器人帳號，甚至是AI生成的留言，它們是預設程式設計好的，甚至能互相對話。故事講述者表示他已經封鎖了這些帳號。
================================================

Shouldn't you be calling Trump a CCP collaborator? He actually talked about unification. Hahaha. But Trump mentioned peaceful unification recently. This week, some Little Pinks. and some fake accounts. have been spreading rumors online. saying Trump talked about peaceful unification. So what about inside and outside the Great Firewall? There are quite a few pro-CCP media outlets. spreading this fake news too. Even some pro-China pundits and lawmakers are chiming in. Even the PRC’s Taiwan Affairs Office is jumping on it. But what's the truth? Let me debunk this CCP propaganda first. Let’s take a look together. at what Trump actually said during his live White House briefing. Here’s some quick background for everyone. The full White House press conference. was 60 minutes long. Trump mainly talked about U.S.-China relations. and the U.S.-China trade deal. Not a single word during the whole thing. mentioned Taiwan at all. But those Little Pinks and red media. still twisted it into “supporting unification.”. So what did Trump actually say? Let’s watch it together. The clip you just saw—. I included the full context. I believe everyone can now clearly see. Trump was talking about U.S.-China trade. Due to time limits,. I’ve summarized the key points for you. If you want to watch the full version,. you can check it out on the official White House channel. What the CCP and Little Pinks. used to spread rumors was this line:. I think it's going to be great for unification and peace. If you just read that one line from Trump. without context,. a direct translation would be:. I think this is great for unification and peace. Then the Little Pinks went nuts,. imagining it meant the U.S. supports cross-strait unification. But we all just saw the actual footage—. when Trump said. “great for unification and peace,”. at that point. he was clearly talking about something else.

That line needs to be understood along with. the press conference’s theme and context. Trump was more focused on. telling the international community and public. that if the U.S. and China can reach consensus. on trade policies, tariffs, and market access,. it would benefit everyone. It would reduce the risk of conflict. and promote peace and stability. in the region and even the world. The U.S. State Department and AIT. also later clarified that statement. But red media twisted it into. “Trump supports cross-strait unification.”. That's just absurd. When I watched the original footage,. I noticed that right around the start—. about six minutes in—. Trump was already talking about the U.S.-China deal. and even made this key point:. “I think it could foster harmony between China and the U.S.”. He never once mentioned Taiwan. The press conference theme. was all about bilateral trade. But the Little Pinks still fantasized. If they really want to say,. Whatever! Trump was clearly talking about national unification—. then who’s the subject? You could twist that line and apply it to South Korea too. Why isn’t South Korea freaking out? Trump once said. maybe Canada should become a U.S. state. Why didn’t Canada freak out? Because that’s clearly not what he meant! So those rumor-spreading red media and Little Pinks,. if you’re gonna make stuff up like this—. then can I also interpret it as:. America supports Taiwan unifying China? America supports Taiwan eliminating the CCP? Unifying all the ROC’s lost territory? If we’re bullsh*tting, let’s all bullsh*t! We Taiwanese are always playing defense. That won’t work in the long run. You see the CCP spreading lies—. even after being exposed,. they just keep making up new ones. So next time, let’s see how they twist the facts—. we’ll use the same magic back on them. And if then,.

some Little Pink who knows English comes along and says:. “That’s not true!”. “You mistranslated it!”. “That’s not what the original means!”. Then great! Let them debunk their own country’s lies. Right? If we’re playing, let’s all play! We’re just decent people—. we normally don’t like using dirty tricks. Now that I’ve debunked this part for you—. if you see any Little Pinks spreading nonsense,. just throw this video at them. Oh and by the way—. here’s what I think about all this. Setting aside the part they twisted—. the core of this press conference,. I believe Trump said it publicly on purpose. Because Trump and his current team. definitely know what the CCP is like. The CCP always says one thing and does another. I’m sure Trump feels that deeply himself. For example, during his first term from 2017 to 2021,. there were many cases. where China made promises but didn’t deliver. The most iconic one being—. the Phase One U.S.-China trade deal. Back then, China pledged. that in 2020 and 2021—. they’d buy $200 billion more in goods and services. on top of the 2017 baseline of $151.2 billion. In the end, it was all talk. The extra $200 billion promised—. never fulfilled. So I think based on that experience,. Trump made sure to say it out loud this time—. to block China’s way out. Trump’s basically telling everyone:. We made a deal. Even though China bailed on me before,. I’m willing to give them one more shot. But if they break their word again—. then don’t blame me. It’s clearly China’s fault. By saying it so publicly,. he’s making sure China can’t. easily flip the table or blur the issue. So now, the pressure is on China. You could say he’s forcing their hand. If China actually follows through this time,.

then great—no problem. But if they break their promise again,. honestly, I wouldn’t be surprised. But doing so. would only deepen China’s reputation as unreliable. It tells the global community—. China simply can’t be trusted. They're an enemy of the global free market. The U.S. could then leverage that,. saying “We’ve tried with China. again and again,. but they still break their word.”. Restart the tariff war—. but with even more force. Then rally Europe, Japan, Australia, etc.,. to jointly call out China’s bad faith. Apply coordinated sanctions on China,. restrict investment, tech exports, and more. That way, the CCP ends up. labeling itself as untrustworthy,. a threat to world order. Warms the heart, right? Let’s watch how it all plays out. What do you all think about this? Feel free to share in the comments below. Now one thing to alert everyone—. especially friends in Taiwan:. Just recently,. the CCP’s Taiwan Affairs Office. suddenly promoted a restaurant opening in Taiwan. Based on my years of anti-CCP experience—. my “Insult China Radar” went off instantly. Let’s first take a look at this clip. If it were just an ordinary. foreign eatery opening a branch in Taiwan,. that’d be no big deal. But this is a China-style snack shop. with CCP officials holding a press conference,. and even People's Daily promoting it. No matter how tasty it is—. I personally wouldn’t want to eat there. Because the money I spend there—. could end up indirectly funding. China’s invasion of Taiwan. That’s a real concern. We all know how the CCP operates—. for them to get the Taiwan Affairs Office’s backing,. even if it’s not a “united front” shop,. it sure feels like. there’s some CCP connection. And you can’t help but think about what comes next—.

like whether they’ll hire staff from China,. become a loophole—. to issue work visas for people to enter Taiwan. Could it turn into a form of demographic laundering? If all that happens,. then it’s not just a united front store anymore—. it becomes a political outpost in Taiwan. And at the same time,. it’s sending a message to. fifth column forces hiding inside Taiwan. You can come here. But if it’s endorsed by the CCP—. personally, I won’t eat it. News even says they plan to expand. and open membership stores across Taiwan by year-end. I hope all of you in Taiwan stay alert—. so you don’t accidentally eat what you don’t want to. Be careful before walking into restaurants too. Every time we spend money—. we’re shaping the world we want to live in. Now, in the second half of today’s video—. let me show you some "headfirst" comments. “If we unify, I’d willingly become a human mine.”. “You can only be used for live organ harvesting.”. What does that mean? So you’re saying right now,. you’re willingly being a human mine inside the firewall? Is this Little Pink being sarcastic? Otherwise, your comment. just admitted that people in China. are human mines for the CCP. And then you say people like me—. can only be used for live harvesting? That means you’re not denying. that the CCP is harvesting organs from humans. If you’re being ironic,. then this kind of comment makes sense. But if you actually meant it, then I’m guessing—. your brain has already been harvested. That’s the only reason you’d say. something so completely illogical. Next one. “Asshole.”. If your vocabulary. is down to just animals—. then I suggest. you start over at the zoo. If I’m the turtle here,. what does that make you for understanding turtle talk? A turtle too, right?

Congrats, you just insulted yourself. This next one’s no surprise—. clearly left by a scam bot talking to itself. “I’m so glad you made this video.”. “I remember when I was homeless—”. “facing so many hardships in life…”. “Until I started earning $75,000 every week…”. “My life went from homeless nobody…”. “to someone who can now enjoy the good things in life.”. This comment is obviously baiting for investment scams—. so they write how much money they made. Then a bunch of weird accounts. chime in with fake replies. They even used other accounts to like their own comment—. over a hundred times—. to push the comment up. so the algorithm recommends it more. Of course, this fake account—. clearly posted in the wrong place. Maybe they were supposed to comment under some finance video,. but messed up the URL or something. Or who knows why—. they ended up randomly dropping it under my video. Using this example—. I want to show everyone—. that online today,. there really are bot accounts out there. Some comments you get might even be from AI. All pre-programmed—. to talk to themselves like that. But I blocked them all—. because they later posted links,. and I didn’t click them in case they had viruses. Didn’t want anyone else clicking either—. just blocked them straight away. If you see stuff like this in the future—. don’t even bother replying. Just block and move on. The third phase of the mass recall is ongoing. As it progresses—. you can expect more attacks from bot accounts. It’ll only get more frequent. Next comment—. “Keep the island, not the people!”. “Nuke for unification!”. That’s probably the 8,964th time. I’ve seen this kind of comment since starting this series. Honestly, after so long—. I’ve started getting curious about one thing. From a psychological standpoint—.

I really want to ask the people who shout:. “Keep the island, not the people!”. The ones screaming for war—. how do you *actually* feel when you say that? Is it excitement? Is it inferiority? Or are you just using fantasies. of destroying others to temporarily escape—. from the fact that. you have zero control over your own life? Little Pink, have you ever thought—. why are you saying crap. that you literally have no ability to do? You can’t even hold up a blank sign in Tiananmen Square. You can’t even post one truth on Weibo without being banned. So tell me—. what gives you the right,. what condition do you have,. to think you can control nukes and decide people’s fate? Isn’t that just funny? Someone who doesn’t even know where they’ll work—. or whether they can go abroad—. is out here fantasizing about Taiwan online. And odds are—. you’ve never even been to Taiwan. Yet you’re still dreaming. that you can help the CCP decide. who to bomb and who to wipe out. Don’t you feel like some wannabe general. playing dress-up in the ruins? Pathetic. You’re climbing the firewall shouting “unify!”—. but really just projecting your own helplessness. You fantasize about nuking others. just because deep down you know—. you can’t change your fate of being a nobody. If you think I’m wrong, Little Pink—. I welcome you to prove me wrong. Go ahead, post on Weibo from inside the firewall—. call for a protest in Tiananmen Square. You can use the exact slogans from your comments. Let’s see if your beloved CCP that keeps hyping you up—. doesn’t end up slamming your face into the ground. Maybe even charge you with “picking quarrels and provoking trouble.”. I’ll wait for you to prove it. That’s it for today’s video. If you liked it, give me a thumbs up and subscribe. And feel free to join my YouTube channel as a member. to support this series. I’m Potter King,.

see you in the next video. Bye Bye.

=============

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=M2-__BTifd4

點連結成為我的Youtube頻道會員：https://goo.gl/MFNUKr

中共造謠美國支持統一，小粉紅歡欣鼓舞！結果原話是這句

國台辦在台統戰據點？共媒背書沙縣小吃台灣餐廳

粉紅特報127期

追蹤我IG：

https://www.instagram.com/potterking712/

追蹤我Threads：

https://www.threads.net/@potterking712

追蹤我臉書粉專：

https://www.facebook.com/Realpotterking
item.description:
影片內容摘要：揭穿川普「統一說」謠言


影片開頭，故事講述者針對近期在網路上和小粉紅、部分親中媒體間流傳的謠言進行駁斥。這些謠言聲稱前美國總統川普最近談到「和平統一」。故事講述者指出，甚至連中國的國台辦和一些親中人士也隨之起舞。為了揭穿這個中共的宣傳，影片展示了川普在白宮記者會上的實際發言片段。
故事講述者解釋，這場長達六十分鐘的記者會主要談論的是美中關係和貿易協議，川普全程並未提及台灣。然而，這些人卻將其扭曲為支持兩岸統一。謠言的核心來自川普的一句話：「I think it\'s going to be great for unification and peace.」故事講述者承認，若斷章取義，這句話直譯確實可能被理解為「我認為這對統一與和平來說很棒」。但影片強調，觀看完整片段後可以清楚看到，川普當時是在談論美中貿易，他想表達的是，如果美中在貿易政策、關稅等方面達成共識，將有助於減少衝突風險，促進區域和世界的和平穩定。
故事講述者指出，即使美國國務院和AIT後來也澄清了這段發言，紅色媒體仍堅持扭曲其原意。他表示，川普早在記者會開頭就說過美中協議「可以促進中國和美國之間的和諧」，因此將這句話硬扯上兩岸統一實屬荒謬。故事講述者建議，台灣不該總是處於防守地位，面對中共的造謠，可以以其人之道還治其人之身，反問既然這句話可以被任意解讀，是否也可以解讀為美國支持台灣統一中國、消滅中共、光復中華民國失地？他認為這樣可以讓那些懂英文的小粉紅去質疑他們自己國家的宣傳。

影片內容摘要：分析川普對中策略


在揭穿謠言後，故事講述者進一步分享了他對川普這段發言的看法。他認為，即使拋開被惡意曲解的部分，川普選擇公開說這些話可能是刻意為之。故事講述者判斷，川普及其團隊肯定了解中共「說一套做一套」的本性，特別是過去的經驗（例如第一階段美中貿易協議中，中國承諾額外購買兩千億美元商品與服務但並未兌現）。
故事講述者認為，川普此舉是在「堵死中國的後路」。他藉由公開聲明，向外界表明「我們達成了一項協議」，儘管中國過去曾違約，但他願意再給一次機會。透過這種公開的方式，川普等於是向全世界宣告，如果中國這次再次違背承諾，責任將完全歸咎於中方，中國也難以翻桌或模糊焦點。
故事講述者分析，這項策略將壓力轉嫁到了中國身上。如果中國這次真的履行承諾，那很好；但如果中國再度違約，雖然不意外，但這將加深中國「不可信賴」的國際形象，向全球證明中國是自由市場的敵人。屆時，美國可以藉此聯合歐洲、日本、澳洲等盟友，共同譴責中國的失信行為，並可能重啟或加強關稅戰，協調對華制裁，限制投資和技術出口等。故事講述者認為，這樣等於是讓中共自己證明自己是不可信賴且威脅世界秩序的角色。

影片內容摘要：警惕在台「統戰店」


影片接著轉向另一個主題，故事講述者向觀眾，特別是台灣的朋友們發出警示。他提到，中共國台辦最近突然高調宣傳一家在台灣開幕的餐飲店。憑藉他多年的反共經驗，直覺認為這可能涉及「統戰」意圖。影片展示了相關新聞，強調這不是一般的海外餐飲進駐，而是一家中式小吃店，卻有中共官方記者會和官媒宣傳。

故事講述者認為，如果這些情況發生，這家店就不僅僅是一家普通的統戰店，而是中共在台灣的一個政治據點。同時，這也是在向潛伏在台灣內部的親共勢力發出集合信號。因此，他個人堅決不吃這類由中共背書的店家。影片提到這家店計畫年底前在台灣各地開分店，故事講述者呼籲台灣的朋友們提高警覺，在踏入餐廳前慎重考慮，因為每一次消費的選擇都在影響我們所處世界的未來。

接著，故事講述者展示了一則簡短但具侮辱性的留言「asshole」。他以幽默的方式回應，如果對方的詞彙只剩下動物，建議其從動物園重新學習。他反擊說，如果他自己是烏龜，那麼能聽懂烏龜話的留言者豈不也是烏龜，等同於留言者在侮辱自己。

================================================

Shouldn't you be calling Trump a CCP collaborator? He actually talked about unification. Hahaha. But Trump mentioned peaceful unification recently. This week, some Little Pinks. and some fake accounts. have been spreading rumors online. saying Trump talked about peaceful unification. So what about inside and outside the Great Firewall? There are quite a few pro-CCP media outlets. spreading this fake news too. Even some pro-China pundits and lawmakers are chiming in. Even the PRC’s Taiwan Affairs Office is jumping on it. But what's the truth? Let me debunk this CCP propaganda first. Let’s take a look together. at what Trump actually said during his live White House briefing. Here’s some quick background for everyone. The full White House press conference. was 60 minutes long. Trump mainly talked about U.S.-China relations. and the U.S.-China trade deal. Not a single word during the whole thing. mentioned Taiwan at all. But those Little Pinks and red media. still twisted it into “supporting unification.”. So what did Trump actually say? Let’s watch it together. The clip you just saw—. I included the full context. I believe everyone can now clearly see. Trump was talking about U.S.-China trade. Due to time limits,. I’ve summarized the key points for you. If you want to watch the full version,. you can check it out on the official White House channel. What the CCP and Little Pinks. used to spread rumors was this line:. I think it's going to be great for unification and peace. If you just read that one line from Trump. without context,. a direct translation would be:. I think this is great for unification and peace. Then the Little Pinks went nuts,. imagining it meant the U.S. supports cross-strait unification. But we all just saw the actual footage—. when Trump said. “great for unification and peace,”. at that point. he was clearly talking about something else.

That line needs to be understood along with. the press conference’s theme and context. Trump was more focused on. telling the international community and public. that if the U.S. and China can reach consensus. on trade policies, tariffs, and market access,. it would benefit everyone. It would reduce the risk of conflict. and promote peace and stability. in the region and even the world. The U.S. State Department and AIT. also later clarified that statement. But red media twisted it into. “Trump supports cross-strait unification.”. That's just absurd. When I watched the original footage,. I noticed that right around the start—. about six minutes in—. Trump was already talking about the U.S.-China deal. and even made this key point:. “I think it could foster harmony between China and the U.S.”. He never once mentioned Taiwan. The press conference theme. was all about bilateral trade. But the Little Pinks still fantasized. If they really want to say,. Whatever! Trump was clearly talking about national unification—. then who’s the subject? You could twist that line and apply it to South Korea too. Why isn’t South Korea freaking out? Trump once said. maybe Canada should become a U.S. state. Why didn’t Canada freak out? Because that’s clearly not what he meant! So those rumor-spreading red media and Little Pinks,. if you’re gonna make stuff up like this—. then can I also interpret it as:. America supports Taiwan unifying China? America supports Taiwan eliminating the CCP? Unifying all the ROC’s lost territory? If we’re bullsh*tting, let’s all bullsh*t! We Taiwanese are always playing defense. That won’t work in the long run. You see the CCP spreading lies—. even after being exposed,. they just keep making up new ones. So next time, let’s see how they twist the facts—. we’ll use the same magic back on them. And if then,.

some Little Pink who knows English comes along and says:. “That’s not true!”. “You mistranslated it!”. “That’s not what the original means!”. Then great! Let them debunk their own country’s lies. Right? If we’re playing, let’s all play! We’re just decent people—. we normally don’t like using dirty tricks. Now that I’ve debunked this part for you—. if you see any Little Pinks spreading nonsense,. just throw this video at them. Oh and by the way—. here’s what I think about all this. Setting aside the part they twisted—. the core of this press conference,. I believe Trump said it publicly on purpose. Because Trump and his current team. definitely know what the CCP is like. The CCP always says one thing and does another. I’m sure Trump feels that deeply himself. For example, during his first term from 2017 to 2021,. there were many cases. where China made promises but didn’t deliver. The most iconic one being—. the Phase One U.S.-China trade deal. Back then, China pledged. that in 2020 and 2021—. they’d buy $200 billion more in goods and services. on top of the 2017 baseline of $151.2 billion. In the end, it was all talk. The extra $200 billion promised—. never fulfilled. So I think based on that experience,. Trump made sure to say it out loud this time—. to block China’s way out. Trump’s basically telling everyone:. We made a deal. Even though China bailed on me before,. I’m willing to give them one more shot. But if they break their word again—. then don’t blame me. It’s clearly China’s fault. By saying it so publicly,. he’s making sure China can’t. easily flip the table or blur the issue. So now, the pressure is on China. You could say he’s forcing their hand. If China actually follows through this time,.

then great—no problem. But if they break their promise again,. honestly, I wouldn’t be surprised. But doing so. would only deepen China’s reputation as unreliable. It tells the global community—. China simply can’t be trusted. They're an enemy of the global free market. The U.S. could then leverage that,. saying “We’ve tried with China. again and again,. but they still break their word.”. Restart the tariff war—. but with even more force. Then rally Europe, Japan, Australia, etc.,. to jointly call out China’s bad faith. Apply coordinated sanctions on China,. restrict investment, tech exports, and more. That way, the CCP ends up. labeling itself as untrustworthy,. a threat to world order. Warms the heart, right? Let’s watch how it all plays out. What do you all think about this? Feel free to share in the comments below. Now one thing to alert everyone—. especially friends in Taiwan:. Just recently,. the CCP’s Taiwan Affairs Office. suddenly promoted a restaurant opening in Taiwan. Based on my years of anti-CCP experience—. my “Insult China Radar” went off instantly. Let’s first take a look at this clip. If it were just an ordinary. foreign eatery opening a branch in Taiwan,. that’d be no big deal. But this is a China-style snack shop. with CCP officials holding a press conference,. and even People's Daily promoting it. No matter how tasty it is—. I personally wouldn’t want to eat there. Because the money I spend there—. could end up indirectly funding. China’s invasion of Taiwan. That’s a real concern. We all know how the CCP operates—. for them to get the Taiwan Affairs Office’s backing,. even if it’s not a “united front” shop,. it sure feels like. there’s some CCP connection. And you can’t help but think about what comes next—.

like whether they’ll hire staff from China,. become a loophole—. to issue work visas for people to enter Taiwan. Could it turn into a form of demographic laundering? If all that happens,. then it’s not just a united front store anymore—. it becomes a political outpost in Taiwan. And at the same time,. it’s sending a message to. fifth column forces hiding inside Taiwan. You can come here. But if it’s endorsed by the CCP—. personally, I won’t eat it. News even says they plan to expand. and open membership stores across Taiwan by year-end. I hope all of you in Taiwan stay alert—. so you don’t accidentally eat what you don’t want to. Be careful before walking into restaurants too. Every time we spend money—. we’re shaping the world we want to live in. Now, in the second half of today’s video—. let me show you some "headfirst" comments. “If we unify, I’d willingly become a human mine.”. “You can only be used for live organ harvesting.”. What does that mean? So you’re saying right now,. you’re willingly being a human mine inside the firewall? Is this Little Pink being sarcastic? Otherwise, your comment. just admitted that people in China. are human mines for the CCP. And then you say people like me—. can only be used for live harvesting? That means you’re not denying. that the CCP is harvesting organs from humans. If you’re being ironic,. then this kind of comment makes sense. But if you actually meant it, then I’m guessing—. your brain has already been harvested. That’s the only reason you’d say. something so completely illogical. Next one. “Asshole.”. If your vocabulary. is down to just animals—. then I suggest. you start over at the zoo. If I’m the turtle here,. what does that make you for understanding turtle talk? A turtle too, right?

Congrats, you just insulted yourself. This next one’s no surprise—. clearly left by a scam bot talking to itself. “I’m so glad you made this video.”. “I remember when I was homeless—”. “facing so many hardships in life…”. “Until I started earning $75,000 every week…”. “My life went from homeless nobody…”. “to someone who can now enjoy the good things in life.”. This comment is obviously baiting for investment scams—. so they write how much money they made. Then a bunch of weird accounts. chime in with fake replies. They even used other accounts to like their own comment—. over a hundred times—. to push the comment up. so the algorithm recommends it more. Of course, this fake account—. clearly posted in the wrong place. Maybe they were supposed to comment under some finance video,. but messed up the URL or something. Or who knows why—. they ended up randomly dropping it under my video. Using this example—. I want to show everyone—. that online today,. there really are bot accounts out there. Some comments you get might even be from AI. All pre-programmed—. to talk to themselves like that. But I blocked them all—. because they later posted links,. and I didn’t click them in case they had viruses. Didn’t want anyone else clicking either—. just blocked them straight away. If you see stuff like this in the future—. don’t even bother replying. Just block and move on. The third phase of the mass recall is ongoing. As it progresses—. you can expect more attacks from bot accounts. It’ll only get more frequent. Next comment—. “Keep the island, not the people!”. “Nuke for unification!”. That’s probably the 8,964th time. I’ve seen this kind of comment since starting this series. Honestly, after so long—. I’ve started getting curious about one thing. From a psychological standpoint—.

I really want to ask the people who shout:. “Keep the island, not the people!”. The ones screaming for war—. how do you *actually* feel when you say that? Is it excitement? Is it inferiority? Or are you just using fantasies. of destroying others to temporarily escape—. from the fact that. you have zero control over your own life? Little Pink, have you ever thought—. why are you saying crap. that you literally have no ability to do? You can’t even hold up a blank sign in Tiananmen Square. You can’t even post one truth on Weibo without being banned. So tell me—. what gives you the right,. what condition do you have,. to think you can control nukes and decide people’s fate? Isn’t that just funny? Someone who doesn’t even know where they’ll work—. or whether they can go abroad—. is out here fantasizing about Taiwan online. And odds are—. you’ve never even been to Taiwan. Yet you’re still dreaming. that you can help the CCP decide. who to bomb and who to wipe out. Don’t you feel like some wannabe general. playing dress-up in the ruins? Pathetic. You’re climbing the firewall shouting “unify!”—. but really just projecting your own helplessness. You fantasize about nuking others. just because deep down you know—. you can’t change your fate of being a nobody. If you think I’m wrong, Little Pink—. I welcome you to prove me wrong. Go ahead, post on Weibo from inside the firewall—. call for a protest in Tiananmen Square. You can use the exact slogans from your comments. Let’s see if your beloved CCP that keeps hyping you up—. doesn’t end up slamming your face into the ground. Maybe even charge you with “picking quarrels and provoking trouble.”. I’ll wait for you to prove it. That’s it for today’s video. If you liked it, give me a thumbs up and subscribe. And feel free to join my YouTube channel as a member. to support this series. I’m Potter King,.

see you in the next video. Bye Bye.

=============

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=M2-__BTifd4

點連結成為我的Youtube頻道會員：https://goo.gl/MFNUKr

中共造謠美國支持統一，小粉紅歡欣鼓舞！結果原話是這句

國台辦在台統戰據點？共媒背書沙縣小吃台灣餐廳

粉紅特報127期

追蹤我IG：

https://www.instagram.com/potterking712/

追蹤我Threads：

https://www.threads.net/@potterking712

追蹤我臉書粉專：

https://www.facebook.com/Realpotterking
item.content:encoded:
影片內容摘要：揭穿川普「統一說」謠言


影片開頭，故事講述者針對近期在網路上和小粉紅、部分親中媒體間流傳的謠言進行駁斥。這些謠言聲稱前美國總統川普最近談到「和平統一」。故事講述者指出，甚至連中國的國台辦和一些親中人士也隨之起舞。為了揭穿這個中共的宣傳，影片展示了川普在白宮記者會上的實際發言片段。
故事講述者解釋，這場長達六十分鐘的記者會主要談論的是美中關係和貿易協議，川普全程並未提及台灣。然而，這些人卻將其扭曲為支持兩岸統一。謠言的核心來自川普的一句話：「I think it\'s going to be great for unification and peace.」故事講述者承認，若斷章取義，這句話直譯確實可能被理解為「我認為這對統一與和平來說很棒」。但影片強調，觀看完整片段後可以清楚看到，川普當時是在談論美中貿易，他想表達的是，如果美中在貿易政策、關稅等方面達成共識，將有助於減少衝突風險，促進區域和世界的和平穩定。
故事講述者指出，即使美國國務院和AIT後來也澄清了這段發言，紅色媒體仍堅持扭曲其原意。他表示，川普早在記者會開頭就說過美中協議「可以促進中國和美國之間的和諧」，因此將這句話硬扯上兩岸統一實屬荒謬。故事講述者建議，台灣不該總是處於防守地位，面對中共的造謠，可以以其人之道還治其人之身，反問既然這句話可以被任意解讀，是否也可以解讀為美國支持台灣統一中國、消滅中共、光復中華民國失地？他認為這樣可以讓那些懂英文的小粉紅去質疑他們自己國家的宣傳。

影片內容摘要：分析川普對中策略


在揭穿謠言後，故事講述者進一步分享了他對川普這段發言的看法。他認為，即使拋開被惡意曲解的部分，川普選擇公開說這些話可能是刻意為之。故事講述者判斷，川普及其團隊肯定了解中共「說一套做一套」的本性，特別是過去的經驗（例如第一階段美中貿易協議中，中國承諾額外購買兩千億美元商品與服務但並未兌現）。
故事講述者認為，川普此舉是在「堵死中國的後路」。他藉由公開聲明，向外界表明「我們達成了一項協議」，儘管中國過去曾違約，但他願意再給一次機會。透過這種公開的方式，川普等於是向全世界宣告，如果中國這次再次違背承諾，責任將完全歸咎於中方，中國也難以翻桌或模糊焦點。
故事講述者分析，這項策略將壓力轉嫁到了中國身上。如果中國這次真的履行承諾，那很好；但如果中國再度違約，雖然不意外，但這將加深中國「不可信賴」的國際形象，向全球證明中國是自由市場的敵人。屆時，美國可以藉此聯合歐洲、日本、澳洲等盟友，共同譴責中國的失信行為，並可能重啟或加強關稅戰，協調對華制裁，限制投資和技術出口等。故事講述者認為，這樣等於是讓中共自己證明自己是不可信賴且威脅世界秩序的角色。

影片內容摘要：警惕在台「統戰店」


影片接著轉向另一個主題，故事講述者向觀眾，特別是台灣的朋友們發出警示。他提到，中共國台辦最近突然高調宣傳一家在台灣開幕的餐飲店。憑藉他多年的反共經驗，直覺認為這可能涉及「統戰」意圖。影片展示了相關新聞，強調這不是一般的海外餐飲進駐，而是一家中式小吃店，卻有中共官方記者會和官媒宣傳。
故事講述者表示，無論食物再美味，他個人都不會去光顧這家店。他的擔憂在於，在這裡的消費所得，可能間接資助了中國侵略台灣的行動。他分析，能夠獲得國台辦的背書，這家店極可能與中共存在關聯，即使不是明確的「統戰」組織，也令人擔憂。他進一步聯想，這是否可能成為一個漏洞，讓中國藉由僱用員工等方式，以工作簽證的名義將人員送進台灣，進行「人口洗錢」？
故事講述者認為，如果這些情況發生，這家店就不僅僅是一家普通的統戰店，而是中共在台灣的一個政治據點。同時，這也是在向潛伏在台灣內部的親共勢力發出集合信號。因此，他個人堅決不吃這類由中共背書的店家。影片提到這家店計畫年底前在台灣各地開分店，故事講述者呼籲台灣的朋友們提高警覺，在踏入餐廳前慎重考慮，因為每一次消費的選擇都在影響我們所處世界的未來。

影片內容摘要：線上留言百態


影片的最後部分，故事講述者分享了他在網路上收到的一些奇特留言。他展示的第一則留言來自一名「小粉紅」，留言說「要統就統我願意做人礦」，緊接著又說「你只配拿去做活體摘除」。故事講述者分析，這段話充滿矛盾，如果留言者是反諷，則前半句等於承認了中國人民是中共的「人礦」，後半句則未否認中共進行活摘器官。如果留言者是認真的，故事講述者戲稱其腦袋可能已經被摘取了，否則不會說出如此不合邏輯的話。
接著，故事講述者展示了一則簡短但具侮辱性的留言「asshole」。他以幽默的方式回應，如果對方的詞彙只剩下動物，建議其從動物園重新學習。他反擊說，如果他自己是烏龜，那麼能聽懂烏龜話的留言者豈不也是烏龜，等同於留言者在侮辱自己。
最後，故事講述者揭露了一則明顯是詐騙機器人留下的留言。這則留言以感謝影片為開頭，隨後編造了一段從無家可歸到每週賺取高額收入的虛假故事，目的顯然是為了引誘他人進行投資詐騙。他指出，這類留言常伴隨大量假帳號的回應和點讚，試圖提高其能見度。故事講述者判斷這則留言可能發錯了地方。他藉此例子提醒觀眾，現今網路上存在許多機器人帳號，甚至是AI生成的留言，它們是預設程式設計好的，甚至能互相對話。故事講述者表示他已經封鎖了這些帳號。
================================================

Shouldn't you be calling Trump a CCP collaborator? He actually talked about unification. Hahaha. But Trump mentioned peaceful unification recently. This week, some Little Pinks. and some fake accounts. have been spreading rumors online. saying Trump talked about peaceful unification. So what about inside and outside the Great Firewall? There are quite a few pro-CCP media outlets. spreading this fake news too. Even some pro-China pundits and lawmakers are chiming in. Even the PRC’s Taiwan Affairs Office is jumping on it. But what's the truth? Let me debunk this CCP propaganda first. Let’s take a look together. at what Trump actually said during his live White House briefing. Here’s some quick background for everyone. The full White House press conference. was 60 minutes long. Trump mainly talked about U.S.-China relations. and the U.S.-China trade deal. Not a single word during the whole thing. mentioned Taiwan at all. But those Little Pinks and red media. still twisted it into “supporting unification.”. So what did Trump actually say? Let’s watch it together. The clip you just saw—. I included the full context. I believe everyone can now clearly see. Trump was talking about U.S.-China trade. Due to time limits,. I’ve summarized the key points for you. If you want to watch the full version,. you can check it out on the official White House channel. What the CCP and Little Pinks. used to spread rumors was this line:. I think it's going to be great for unification and peace. some Little Pink who knows English comes along and says:. “That’s not true!”. “You mistranslated it!”. “That’s not what the original means!”. Then great! Let them debunk their own country’s lies. Right? If we’re playing, let’s all play! We’re just decent people—. we normally don’t like using dirty tricks. Setting aside the part they twisted—. the core of this press conference,. I believe Trump said it publicly on purpose. Because Trump and his current team. definitely know what the CCP is like. Back then, China pledged. that in 2020 and 2021—. they’d buy $200 billion more in goods and services. on top of the 2017 baseline of $151.2 billion. In the end, it was all talk. The extra $200 billion promised—. never fulfilled. So I think based on that experience,. Trump made sure to say it out loud this time—. to block China’s way out. Trump’s basically telling everyone:. We made a deal. Even though China bailed on me before,. I’m willing to give them one more shot. But if they break their word again—. then don’t blame me. It’s clearly China’s fault. By saying it so publicly,. he’s making sure China can’t. easily flip the table or blur the issue. So now, the pressure is on China. You could say he’s forcing their hand. If China actually follows through this time,.

then great—no problem. But if they break their promise again,. honestly, I wouldn’t be surprised. But doing so. would only deepen China’s reputation as unreliable. It tells the global community—. Apply coordinated sanctions on China,. restrict investment, tech exports, and more. That way, the CCP ends up. labeling itself as untrustworthy,. a threat to world order. Warms the heart, right? Let’s watch how it all plays out. What do you all think about this? Feel free to share in the comments below. Now one thing to alert everyone—. especially friends in Taiwan:. Just recently,. the CCP’s Taiwan Affairs Office. suddenly promoted a restaurant opening in Taiwan. Based on my years of anti-CCP experience—. my “Insult China Radar” went off instantly. Let’s first take a look at this clip. If it were just an ordinary. foreign eatery opening a branch in Taiwan,. that’d be no big deal. But this is a China-style snack shop. with CCP officials holding a press conference,. and even People's Daily promoting it. No matter how tasty it is—. I personally wouldn’t want to eat there. Because the money I spend there—. could end up indirectly funding. China’s invasion of Taiwan. That’s a real concern. We all know how the CCP operates—. for them to get the Taiwan Affairs Office’s backing,. even if it’s not a “united front” shop,. it sure feels like. there’s some CCP connection. And you can’t help but think about what comes next—.

like whether they’ll hire staff from China,. become a loophole—. to issue work visas for people to enter Taiwan. Could it turn into a form of demographic laundering? If all that happens,. then it’s not just a united front store anymore—. it becomes a political outpost in Taiwan. And at the same time,. it’s sending a message to. fifth column forces hiding inside Taiwan. You can come here. But if it’s endorsed by the CCP—. personally, I won’t eat it. News even says they plan to expand. and open membership stores across Taiwan by year-end. I hope all of you in Taiwan stay alert—. so you don’t accidentally eat what you don’t want to. Be careful before walking into restaurants too. Every time we spend money—. we’re shaping the world we want to live in. Now, in the second half of today’s video—. let me show you some "headfirst" comments. “If we unify, I’d willingly become a human mine.”. “You can only be used for live organ harvesting.”. What does that mean? So you’re saying right now,. you’re willingly being a human mine inside the firewall? Is this Little Pink being sarcastic? Otherwise, your comment. just admitted that people in China. are human mines for the CCP. And then you say people like me—. can only be used for live harvesting? That means you’re not denying. that the CCP is harvesting organs from humans. If you’re being ironic,. then this kind of comment makes sense. But if you actually meant it, then I’m guessing—. your brain has already been harvested. That’s the only reason you’d say. something so completely illogical. Next one. “Asshole.”. If your vocabulary. is down to just animals—. then I suggest. you start over at the zoo. If I’m the turtle here,. what does that make you for understanding turtle talk? A turtle too, right?

Congrats, you just insulted yourself. This next one’s no surprise—. clearly left by a scam bot talking to itself. “I’m so glad you made this video.”. “I remember when I was homeless—”. “facing so many hardships in life…”. “Until I started earning $75,000 every week…”. “My life went from homeless nobody…”. “to someone who can now enjoy the good things in life.”. This comment is obviously baiting for investment scams—. so they write how much money they made. Then a bunch of weird accounts. chime in with fake replies. They even used other accounts to like their own comment—. over a hundred times—. to push the comment up. so the algorithm recommends it more. Of course, this fake account—. clearly posted in the wrong place. Maybe they were supposed to comment under some finance video,. but messed up the URL or something. Or who knows why—. they ended up randomly dropping it under my video. Using this example—. I want to show everyone—. that online today,. there really are bot accounts out there. Some comments you get might even be from AI. All pre-programmed—. to talk to themselves like that. But I blocked them all—. because they later posted links,. and I didn’t click them in case they had viruses. Didn’t want anyone else clicking either—. just blocked them straight away. If you see stuff like this in the future—. don’t even bother replying. Just block and move on. The third phase of the mass recall is ongoing. As it progresses—. you can expect more attacks from bot accounts. It’ll only get more frequent. Next comment—. “Keep the island, not the people!”. “Nuke for unification!”. That’s probably the 8,964th time. I’ve seen this kind of comment since starting this series. Honestly, after so long—. I’ve started getting curious about one thing. From a psychological standpoint—.

I really want to ask the people who shout:. “Keep the island, not the people!”. The ones screaming for war—. how do you *actually* feel when you say that? Is it excitement? Is it inferiority? Or are you just using fantasies. of destroying others to temporarily escape—. from the fact that. you have zero control over your own life? Little Pink, have you ever thought—. why are you saying crap. that you literally have no ability to do? You can’t even hold up a blank sign in Tiananmen Square. You can’t even post one truth on Weibo without being banned. So tell me—. what gives you the right,. what condition do you have,. to think you can control nukes and decide people’s fate? Isn’t that just funny? Someone who doesn’t even know where they’ll work—. or whether they can go abroad—. is out here fantasizing about Taiwan online. And odds are—. you’ve never even been to Taiwan. Yet you’re still dreaming. that you can help the CCP decide. who to bomb and who to wipe out. Don’t you feel like some wannabe general. playing dress-up in the ruins? Pathetic. You’re climbing the firewall shouting “unify!”—. but really just projecting your own helplessness. You fantasize about nuking others. just because deep down you know—. you can’t change your fate of being a nobody. If you think I’m wrong, Little Pink—. I welcome you to prove me wrong. Go ahead, post on Weibo from inside the firewall—. call for a protest in Tiananmen Square. You can use the exact slogans from your comments. Let’s see if your beloved CCP that keeps hyping you up—. doesn’t end up slamming your face into the ground. Maybe even charge you with “picking quarrels and provoking trouble.”. I’ll wait for you to prove it. That’s it for today’s video. If you liked it, give me a thumbs up and subscribe. And feel free to join my YouTube channel as a member. to support this series. I’m Potter King,.

see you in the next video. Bye Bye.

=============

item.title: 台美準建交不再是夢？兩大挺台修正法案！美官員稱台灣是國家｜美國會點名中共強摘人礦零件，通過法案禁止強摘｜@EmmaSleepTaiwan ｜粉紅特報126期
item.itunes:title: 台美準建交不再是夢？兩大挺台修正法案！美官員稱台灣是國家｜美國會點名中共強摘人礦零件，通過法案禁止強摘｜@EmmaSleepTaiwan ｜粉紅特報126期
item.itunes:author: 波特王好帥
item.itunes:summary:
美國眾議院通過挺台法案


該影片的說故事者，波特老師，開場歡迎觀眾回到節目，並表示曾認為台美之間建立外交關係是遙不可及的夢想，但近年來，雖然正式建交仍難，卻不再覺得絕無可能。他指出，本週五，美國眾議院通過了兩項挺台的修正案法案：「台灣保證實施法案」和「台灣國際團結法案」，認為這是令人振奮的發展。

法案內容及其重要性


說故事者接著詳細介紹這兩項法案的內容。「台灣國際團結法案」修正了2019年的《台北法案》，重申美國支持台灣參與國際組織，並鼓勵其他國家加強與台灣的官方或非官方關係。新法案特別澄清，聯合國第2758號決議不涉及台灣或其人民在聯合國或相關組織中的代表權問題，藉此反駁中共長期對該決議的曲解，並向國際社會表明台灣不屬於中華人民共和國，以對抗中共對台灣的壓迫。另一項「台灣保證實施法案」則取消了美台官員互動的限制，允許雙方人員自由往來。說故事者強調，這兩項法案的通過是美台關係的重大里程碑，是歷史性的時刻。他引用了法案提案人之一、美國眾議員安·華格納的發言片段，華格納稱呼台灣為「this country」（這個國家），顯示美國官員公開稱台灣為國家，對小粉紅而言無疑是「玻璃心碎滿地」，標誌著美國已從戰略模糊轉向對台灣的制度化支持。他也引用了另一位發言的眾議員布萊恩·馬斯特的評論，並指出兩項法案最終都以無異議方式通過。

地緣政治分析與戰略轉變


說故事者進一步分析稱，美國清楚意識到區域盟友視美台關係為美國信譽的指標。台灣位處印太地區的關鍵地緣政治樞紐，是民主防線的第一線。他引用前美國印太司令部司令戴維森的話，指出台灣是美國在印太地區利益的核心基石。若美國放棄台灣，不僅影響自身國安，也無法向盟友交代，意味著台灣的利益已等同於美國的利益。中共對台灣的威脅及其與俄羅斯、北韓的結盟，對美國而言已難以容忍，迫使美國必須從戰略模糊轉向戰略清晰。儘管短期內是否能正式建交仍是未知數，但台美關係已明顯轉變，正走向準外交關係。他推測，如果中共對台動武或內部發生政治危機崩潰，正式建交的進程將會大幅加快。說故事者呼籲台灣人必須抓住此時機，不要妄自菲薄，並認為罷免親共立委是台灣人展現給世界看的功課。

另一項重要法案：禁止活摘器官


除了上述兩項挺台法案，說故事者提到，當天長達九小時的美國眾議院會議還通過了另一項他認為相當重要的法案：「停止強制活摘器官法案」。他特別強調，布萊恩·馬斯特議員在談論此案時，直接點名這一切的幕後黑手就是中國共產黨。說故事者對這種行徑表示難以置信和荒謬，認為活摘器官這種反人類罪行，對一般人而言連想都不會想，但中共政權卻做得理所當然。他以台灣屠宰雞豬仍講究人道對比，認為中國人在中共統治下活得不如雞豬。說故事者甚至提出一個令人不寒而慄的觀點，認為中共極力想攻打台灣的原因，除了戰略位置，另一個可能是因為台灣人的器官比中國大陸居民更健康。他提到中國大陸是「人體礦山」，人民飲食不安全，且經過疫情和科興疫苗的影響，許多人可能已不適合捐獻器官。他引用科興創辦人因疫苗副作用被判死刑的例子，並警告若台灣被中共佔領，歷史將被改寫，台灣人的處境將比新疆集中營更慘，並非危言聳聽，因為中共大使盧沙野曾公開說要對台灣人進行「再教育」。因此，他再次呼籲台灣人絕不能讓這種事發生，要抓住契機，淘汰親共立委，強調反共是良心問題，也是台灣人生存問題。

回應觀眾留言


影片後半段，說故事者開始回應觀眾留言，特別是「小粉紅」的惡意評論。對於被指稱是「獨立媒體，結果是官媒」，他戲稱自己被升級，並回擊留言者可能連「官媒」（器官）都不保。對於質疑其繁體中文和國語奇怪，並挑釁兩千多萬人如何讓十四億人投降的留言，他列舉了中共可能使用的核彈、無人機、航母、東風41飛彈、台積電、茶葉蛋或「美國乾爹」等方式，並針對留言者聲稱若「美國乾爹」靠近台灣就直播吃屎的賭注，提供了裴洛西訪台、上個月美國參議員代表團訪台、二月美軍軍艦穿越台灣海峽等例子，質疑對方是否要兌現承諾，並截圖存證。他也回應了稱他為「綠腦暴徒」、「民進黨側翼」的留言，反駁這種扣帽子的邏輯，並強調自己發言皆有查證，甚至翻譯國外影片，諷刺按照這種邏輯，美國眾議院也成了民進黨的宣傳部門。最後，他回應了說他「又好笑又是I人（內向者）」的留言，藉此機會為內向者發聲，解釋內向者並非不擅社交，只是需要獨處充電，並強調一個人是否幽默與內向或外向無關，而是表達能力、觀察力、情商、思維模式和創造力的結合。
================================================

Hello everyone, welcome back to this week's Pink News Special. I'm your best anti-CCP investment advisor,. Teacher Potter. Seeing diplomatic ties between Taiwan and the U.S. in our lifetime. used to feel unimaginable. It felt too far-fetched. But in recent years,. especially considering current trends,. although establishing formal ties is still difficult,. it now feels. no longer absolutely impossible. On Friday this week, the U.S. House of Representatives. passed two pro-Taiwan amendment bills:. The Taiwan Assurance Implementation Act. and the Taiwan International Solidarity Act. Truly heartwarming. We’ll talk more about this shortly. But before that—. So, the two bills passed this week in the U.S.:. The Taiwan Assurance Implementation Act. and the Taiwan International Solidarity Act—. what do they contain? The Taiwan International Solidarity Act. amends the 2019 TAIPEI Act,. stating that the U.S. supports Taiwan’s participation in international organizations. and encourages other countries. to strengthen official or unofficial ties with Taiwan. This new version,. the Taiwan International Solidarity Act,. adds clarification. that U.N. Resolution 2758. does not address Taiwan or its people. regarding representation in the U.N. or related bodies. In simpler terms,. it denounces. the CCP's long-term distortion of Resolution 2758. The U.S. is using its voice on the global stage. to inform the international community. that Taiwan is not a part of the PRC. This counters the CCP’s suppression of Taiwan.

and supports Taiwan’s participation in global organizations. The other bill passed by the U.S. Congress,. the Taiwan Assurance Implementation Act,. removes restrictions on U.S.–Taiwan official interactions,. allowing free engagement between personnel from both sides. The passage of these two bills. marks a major milestone in Taiwan-U.S. relations. We are witnessing history. Let’s take a look at what Congresswoman Ann Wagner, one of the sponsors, had to say. Ann Wagner is one of the sponsors. Did you catch that clip just now? She said the U.S. should support *this country*—. Which country? Taiwan. The little pinks’ fragile hearts are gonna break. Now U.S. officials. are publicly referring to Taiwan as a country. This shift is highly significant. I believe by now, you all understand clearly. that the U.S. Congress has moved from strategic ambiguity. to institutionalized support for Taiwan. And it’s not just one congressperson’s support—. the entire session was extensive,. but I’ll highlight two key segments for you. Another congressman,. Brian Mast, also spoke out. In the end, both bills. were passed unanimously. What Brian just said. reminded me of something from two months ago:. Former U.S. Indo-Pacific commander Davidson. publicly stated. that many U.S. regional allies see U.S.–Taiwan relations. as a benchmark for America's credibility. If Indo-Pacific influence is a core U.S. interest,. then Taiwan is a crucial cornerstone. That’s a direct quote from him. The U.S. is clearly aware. that other democracies are watching how it engages with Taiwan. Taiwan is a key geopolitical hub in the Indo-Pacific.

Its location is strategic,. seen as the first line of democratic defense. If the U.S. were to abandon Taiwan,. not only would it impact U.S. national security,. it would also be indefensible to its allies. Taiwan’s interests are now. equivalent to America’s. The CCP's threats to Taiwan,. its alliances with Russia and North Korea,. are becoming intolerable for the U.S. Strategic ambiguity is no longer sustainable; they must shift to strategic clarity. Of course, formal Taiwan–U.S. ties in the short term. are something I hope for,. but I won’t jump to conclusions. Still, we can see clearly. that Taiwan-U.S. relations have changed. Even without formal ties,. they’re moving toward a quasi-diplomatic relationship. It’s just that formal procedures take time. Even without formal recognition,. substantively, we’re already beyond what normal ties would bring. However, if the CCP invades Taiwan militarily. or collapses from an internal political crisis,. then I think. formal diplomatic ties would be greatly accelerated. In any case,. we Taiwanese must seize this moment. Do not sell ourselves short. As for those pro-CCP KMT legislators,. this is our homework as Taiwanese—. to recall and remove them. We must show this to the world as well. Let’s keep fighting together. This session of the U.S. House of Representatives. was live-streamed for quite a long time—. a full nine hours. Besides the two bills we mentioned earlier,. another bill was also passed. Personally, I think it's quite important too,.

although I noticed that in Taiwanese news media,. this part doesn’t seem to be widely reported. But maybe I just missed it. Anyway, I’ve put it together here for you. That bill is—. the Stop Forced Organ Harvesting Act. And when Congressman Brian spoke about it,. he specifically called out the Chinese Communist Party,. because the CCP is behind it all. Before talking about this issue,. he expressed disbelief that in today’s world,. this is still happening—. it's absolutely absurd. He said it’s incredible. that we even need to speak out. against something like this. Because normal people. would never even think. of doing such a thing. But the CCP government actually would. Let’s take a look at that clip. The CCP’s live organ harvesting. actually needs to be outlawed through legislation. Most people wouldn’t even think of doing such a thing,. but for the Communist Party,. this crime against humanity. is carried out as naturally as breathing. Here in Taiwan, even when slaughtering pigs or chickens,. we talk about doing it humanely. But people in China under the CCP. live worse than pigs or chickens. I believe one of the reasons the CCP is so determined to invade Taiwan. is not just its strategic location—. another reason is that right now,. Taiwanese organs. are healthier than those of mainlanders. Everyone knows that people in the PRC are "human mines," fed with toxic food and harsh chemicals. And during the pandemic,. many in China got the Sinovac vaccine—.

they’re probably no longer viable donors. The Sinovac founder who was once praised. as a national hero by the CCP,. was later sentenced to death. because of the vaccine’s severe side effects. So if the CCP successfully invades Taiwan,. not only will history be rewritten,. but Taiwanese people. will live worse than those in Xinjiang camps. This isn’t fearmongering—. even CCP ambassador Lu Shaye said it:. After taking Taiwan,. the people must be "re-educated." So we must never let this happen. Let’s seize Taiwan’s current momentum,. get rid of pro-CCP legislators. Opposing the CCP is a matter of conscience. and the survival of Taiwanese people. Let’s all work together in Phase 3! Come on, fist bump! Let’s go! Now in the second half of this video,. let’s take a look at some funny hate comments. “Thought it was independent media, turns out it’s state media.”. In the eyes of little pinks,. I’ve apparently been upgraded to the level of state media, huh? But I’m not state media—. You’re more likely to be missing your *state media*— I mean, your organs. Why do your traditional Chinese and Mandarin sound so ridiculous? How can 1.4 billion people surrender to just 20 million of you? With what? With nuclear bombs? Drones? Aircraft carriers? DF-41 missiles? TSMC or tea eggs? Or your American godfather? If your American godfather can get near Taiwan,. I'll livestream myself eating shit. If they can’t get close to Taiwan,.

then will *you* eat shit? Glad I read your comment all the way through. Even though it started with a bunch of crap,. just remember what you said at the end—. You said if the U.S. gets close to Taiwan,. you’ll eat shit on livestream. Well then, little pink,. go ahead and book a livestream time with me. Didn’t Pelosi already visit Taiwan? Or if that’s too long ago for you—. A U.S. Senate delegation came just last month. Isn’t that your so-called American godfather? Don’t tell me now. that setting foot in Taiwan doesn’t count. And what about February, when U.S. warships passed through the Taiwan Strait? Does that count as “near Taiwan”? You little pink named “BoogerBooger”—. I took a screenshot. Don’t hide now. Come out and keep your promise. No one even asked you to bet with poop in the first place. But why do little pinks always love making that the wager? I seriously suspect—. you secretly wanted to eat it anyway. Alright then, dream granted. Dear Booger bro,. get ready and start eating. LOL, the green-brained thugs are here again. I suggest everyone unsubscribe ASAP. Just another DPP shill spreading lies and propaganda. You can’t even win against someone you call “green-brained.”. So aren’t you even more brainless? How pitiful. All you know is slinging mud. Why is it that being anti-CCP. makes someone a DPP lackey? Then if you’re pro-CCP,. you must be a KMT or CCP lackey. And where exactly did I lie? Everything I said has been fact-checked.

I even translated foreign videos for you. So by your logic,. even the U.S. House of Representatives. is a DPP propaganda arm now? Why is Potter King so funny? He’s clearly an introvert. If I could,. I wouldn’t just be an I-person—. I’d want to be the one you love. Introverts save words,. not intelligence. Being quiet doesn’t mean we can’t make you laugh till you cry. Of course, that commenter wasn’t a little pink. It’s just that recently,. I’ve seen some people online. seem to misunderstand introverts. And I just felt—. I need to speak up for my fellow introverts. We introverts. aren’t incapable of socializing—. we just need alone time afterward to recharge. Solitude is how introverts recharge. Extroverts get energy from interaction. Whether someone is funny or not. has nothing to do with being an I or E. Humor requires expression, observation, and emotional intelligence,. and combining that. with thinking style and creativity. It’s a result of all these things combined. It has nothing to do with being introverted or extroverted. In fact, introverts often, because of their attentiveness. and detailed thinking,. can land jokes. in the most unexpected places. Extroverts are fireworks; Introverts are snipers. One dazzles; The other hits the mark. Each has their brilliance. I think both are awesome in their own way.

=============

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zkqPs5Yt7jw

item.description:
美國眾議院通過挺台法案


該影片的說故事者，波特老師，開場歡迎觀眾回到節目，並表示曾認為台美之間建立外交關係是遙不可及的夢想，但近年來，雖然正式建交仍難，卻不再覺得絕無可能。他指出，本週五，美國眾議院通過了兩項挺台的修正案法案：「台灣保證實施法案」和「台灣國際團結法案」，認為這是令人振奮的發展。

法案內容及其重要性


說故事者接著詳細介紹這兩項法案的內容。「台灣國際團結法案」修正了2019年的《台北法案》，重申美國支持台灣參與國際組織，並鼓勵其他國家加強與台灣的官方或非官方關係。新法案特別澄清，聯合國第2758號決議不涉及台灣或其人民在聯合國或相關組織中的代表權問題，藉此反駁中共長期對該決議的曲解，並向國際社會表明台灣不屬於中華人民共和國，以對抗中共對台灣的壓迫。另一項「台灣保證實施法案」則取消了美台官員互動的限制，允許雙方人員自由往來。說故事者強調，這兩項法案的通過是美台關係的重大里程碑，是歷史性的時刻。他引用了法案提案人之一、美國眾議員安·華格納的發言片段，華格納稱呼台灣為「this country」（這個國家），顯示美國官員公開稱台灣為國家，對小粉紅而言無疑是「玻璃心碎滿地」，標誌著美國已從戰略模糊轉向對台灣的制度化支持。他也引用了另一位發言的眾議員布萊恩·馬斯特的評論，並指出兩項法案最終都以無異議方式通過。

地緣政治分析與戰略轉變


說故事者進一步分析稱，美國清楚意識到區域盟友視美台關係為美國信譽的指標。台灣位處印太地區的關鍵地緣政治樞紐，是民主防線的第一線。他引用前美國印太司令部司令戴維森的話，指出台灣是美國在印太地區利益的核心基石。若美國放棄台灣，不僅影響自身國安，也無法向盟友交代，意味著台灣的利益已等同於美國的利益。中共對台灣的威脅及其與俄羅斯、北韓的結盟，對美國而言已難以容忍，迫使美國必須從戰略模糊轉向戰略清晰。儘管短期內是否能正式建交仍是未知數，但台美關係已明顯轉變，正走向準外交關係。他推測，如果中共對台動武或內部發生政治危機崩潰，正式建交的進程將會大幅加快。說故事者呼籲台灣人必須抓住此時機，不要妄自菲薄，並認為罷免親共立委是台灣人展現給世界看的功課。

另一項重要法案：禁止活摘器官


除了上述兩項挺台法案，說故事者提到，當天長達九小時的美國眾議院會議還通過了另一項他認為相當重要的法案：「停止強制活摘器官法案」。他特別強調，布萊恩·馬斯特議員在談論此案時，直接點名這一切的幕後黑手就是中國共產黨。說故事者對這種行徑表示難以置信和荒謬，認為活摘器官這種反人類罪行，對一般人而言連想都不會想，但中共政權卻做得理所當然。他以台灣屠宰雞豬仍講究人道對比，認為中國人在中共統治下活得不如雞豬。說故事者甚至提出一個令人不寒而慄的觀點，認為中共極力想攻打台灣的原因，除了戰略位置，另一個可能是因為台灣人的器官比中國大陸居民更健康。他提到中國大陸是「人體礦山」，人民飲食不安全，且經過疫情和科興疫苗的影響，許多人可能已不適合捐獻器官。他引用科興創辦人因疫苗副作用被判死刑的例子，並警告若台灣被中共佔領，歷史將被改寫，台灣人的處境將比新疆集中營更慘，並非危言聳聽，因為中共大使盧沙野曾公開說要對台灣人進行「再教育」。因此，他再次呼籲台灣人絕不能讓這種事發生，要抓住契機，淘汰親共立委，強調反共是良心問題，也是台灣人生存問題。

回應觀眾留言


影片後半段，說故事者開始回應觀眾留言，特別是「小粉紅」的惡意評論。對於被指稱是「獨立媒體，結果是官媒」，他戲稱自己被升級，並回擊留言者可能連「官媒」（器官）都不保。對於質疑其繁體中文和國語奇怪，並挑釁兩千多萬人如何讓十四億人投降的留言，他列舉了中共可能使用的核彈、無人機、航母、東風41飛彈、台積電、茶葉蛋或「美國乾爹」等方式，並針對留言者聲稱若「美國乾爹」靠近台灣就直播吃屎的賭注，提供了裴洛西訪台、上個月美國參議員代表團訪台、二月美軍軍艦穿越台灣海峽等例子，質疑對方是否要兌現承諾，並截圖存證。他也回應了稱他為「綠腦暴徒」、「民進黨側翼」的留言，反駁這種扣帽子的邏輯，並強調自己發言皆有查證，甚至翻譯國外影片，諷刺按照這種邏輯，美國眾議院也成了民進黨的宣傳部門。最後，他回應了說他「又好笑又是I人（內向者）」的留言，藉此機會為內向者發聲，解釋內向者並非不擅社交，只是需要獨處充電，並強調一個人是否幽默與內向或外向無關，而是表達能力、觀察力、情商、思維模式和創造力的結合。
================================================

Hello everyone, welcome back to this week's Pink News Special. I'm your best anti-CCP investment advisor,. Teacher Potter. Seeing diplomatic ties between Taiwan and the U.S. in our lifetime. used to feel unimaginable. It felt too far-fetched. But in recent years,. especially considering current trends,. although establishing formal ties is still difficult,. it now feels. no longer absolutely impossible. On Friday this week, the U.S. House of Representatives. passed two pro-Taiwan amendment bills:. The Taiwan Assurance Implementation Act. and the Taiwan International Solidarity Act. Truly heartwarming. We’ll talk more about this shortly. But before that—. So, the two bills passed this week in the U.S.:. The Taiwan Assurance Implementation Act. and the Taiwan International Solidarity Act—. what do they contain? The Taiwan International Solidarity Act. amends the 2019 TAIPEI Act,. stating that the U.S. supports Taiwan’s participation in international organizations. and encourages other countries. to strengthen official or unofficial ties with Taiwan. This new version,. the Taiwan International Solidarity Act,. adds clarification. that U.N. Resolution 2758. does not address Taiwan or its people. regarding representation in the U.N. or related bodies. In simpler terms,. it denounces. the CCP's long-term distortion of Resolution 2758. The U.S. is using its voice on the global stage. to inform the international community. that Taiwan is not a part of the PRC. This counters the CCP’s suppression of Taiwan.

and supports Taiwan’s participation in global organizations. The other bill passed by the U.S. Congress,. the Taiwan Assurance Implementation Act,. removes restrictions on U.S.–Taiwan official interactions,. allowing free engagement between personnel from both sides. The passage of these two bills. marks a major milestone in Taiwan-U.S. relations. We are witnessing history. Let’s take a look at what Congresswoman Ann Wagner, one of the sponsors, had to say. Ann Wagner is one of the sponsors. Did you catch that clip just now? She said the U.S. should support *this country*—. Which country? Taiwan. The little pinks’ fragile hearts are gonna break. Now U.S. officials. are publicly referring to Taiwan as a country. This shift is highly significant. I believe by now, you all understand clearly. that the U.S. Congress has moved from strategic ambiguity. to institutionalized support for Taiwan. And it’s not just one congressperson’s support—. the entire session was extensive,. but I’ll highlight two key segments for you. Another congressman,. Brian Mast, also spoke out. In the end, both bills. were passed unanimously. What Brian just said. reminded me of something from two months ago:. Former U.S. Indo-Pacific commander Davidson. publicly stated. that many U.S. regional allies see U.S.–Taiwan relations. as a benchmark for America's credibility. If Indo-Pacific influence is a core U.S. interest,. then Taiwan is a crucial cornerstone. That’s a direct quote from him. The U.S. is clearly aware. that other democracies are watching how it engages with Taiwan. Taiwan is a key geopolitical hub in the Indo-Pacific.

Its location is strategic,. seen as the first line of democratic defense. If the U.S. were to abandon Taiwan,. not only would it impact U.S. national security,. it would also be indefensible to its allies. Taiwan’s interests are now. equivalent to America’s. The CCP's threats to Taiwan,. its alliances with Russia and North Korea,. are becoming intolerable for the U.S. Strategic ambiguity is no longer sustainable; they must shift to strategic clarity. Of course, formal Taiwan–U.S. ties in the short term. are something I hope for,. but I won’t jump to conclusions. Still, we can see clearly. that Taiwan-U.S. relations have changed. Even without formal ties,. they’re moving toward a quasi-diplomatic relationship. It’s just that formal procedures take time. Even without formal recognition,. substantively, we’re already beyond what normal ties would bring. However, if the CCP invades Taiwan militarily. or collapses from an internal political crisis,. then I think. formal diplomatic ties would be greatly accelerated. In any case,. we Taiwanese must seize this moment. Do not sell ourselves short. As for those pro-CCP KMT legislators,. this is our homework as Taiwanese—. to recall and remove them. We must show this to the world as well. Let’s keep fighting together. This session of the U.S. House of Representatives. was live-streamed for quite a long time—. a full nine hours. Besides the two bills we mentioned earlier,. another bill was also passed. Personally, I think it's quite important too,.

although I noticed that in Taiwanese news media,. this part doesn’t seem to be widely reported. But maybe I just missed it. Anyway, I’ve put it together here for you. That bill is—. the Stop Forced Organ Harvesting Act. And when Congressman Brian spoke about it,. he specifically called out the Chinese Communist Party,. because the CCP is behind it all. Before talking about this issue,. he expressed disbelief that in today’s world,. this is still happening—. it's absolutely absurd. He said it’s incredible. that we even need to speak out. against something like this. Because normal people. would never even think. of doing such a thing. But the CCP government actually would. Let’s take a look at that clip. The CCP’s live organ harvesting. actually needs to be outlawed through legislation. Most people wouldn’t even think of doing such a thing,. but for the Communist Party,. this crime against humanity. is carried out as naturally as breathing. Here in Taiwan, even when slaughtering pigs or chickens,. we talk about doing it humanely. But people in China under the CCP. live worse than pigs or chickens. I believe one of the reasons the CCP is so determined to invade Taiwan. is not just its strategic location—. another reason is that right now,. Taiwanese organs. are healthier than those of mainlanders. Everyone knows that people in the PRC are "human mines," fed with toxic food and harsh chemicals. And during the pandemic,. many in China got the Sinovac vaccine—.

they’re probably no longer viable donors. The Sinovac founder who was once praised. as a national hero by the CCP,. was later sentenced to death. because of the vaccine’s severe side effects. So if the CCP successfully invades Taiwan,. not only will history be rewritten,. but Taiwanese people. will live worse than those in Xinjiang camps. This isn’t fearmongering—. even CCP ambassador Lu Shaye said it:. After taking Taiwan,. the people must be "re-educated." So we must never let this happen. Let’s seize Taiwan’s current momentum,. get rid of pro-CCP legislators. Opposing the CCP is a matter of conscience. and the survival of Taiwanese people. Let’s all work together in Phase 3! Come on, fist bump! Let’s go! Now in the second half of this video,. let’s take a look at some funny hate comments. “Thought it was independent media, turns out it’s state media.”. In the eyes of little pinks,. I’ve apparently been upgraded to the level of state media, huh? But I’m not state media—. You’re more likely to be missing your *state media*— I mean, your organs. Why do your traditional Chinese and Mandarin sound so ridiculous? How can 1.4 billion people surrender to just 20 million of you? With what? With nuclear bombs? Drones? Aircraft carriers? DF-41 missiles? TSMC or tea eggs? Or your American godfather? If your American godfather can get near Taiwan,. I'll livestream myself eating shit. If they can’t get close to Taiwan,.

then will *you* eat shit? Glad I read your comment all the way through. Even though it started with a bunch of crap,. just remember what you said at the end—. You said if the U.S. gets close to Taiwan,. you’ll eat shit on livestream. Well then, little pink,. go ahead and book a livestream time with me. Didn’t Pelosi already visit Taiwan? Or if that’s too long ago for you—. A U.S. Senate delegation came just last month. Isn’t that your so-called American godfather? Don’t tell me now. that setting foot in Taiwan doesn’t count. And what about February, when U.S. warships passed through the Taiwan Strait? Does that count as “near Taiwan”? You little pink named “BoogerBooger”—. I took a screenshot. Don’t hide now. Come out and keep your promise. No one even asked you to bet with poop in the first place. But why do little pinks always love making that the wager? I seriously suspect—. you secretly wanted to eat it anyway. Alright then, dream granted. Dear Booger bro,. get ready and start eating. LOL, the green-brained thugs are here again. I suggest everyone unsubscribe ASAP. Just another DPP shill spreading lies and propaganda. You can’t even win against someone you call “green-brained.”. So aren’t you even more brainless? How pitiful. All you know is slinging mud. Why is it that being anti-CCP. makes someone a DPP lackey? Then if you’re pro-CCP,. you must be a KMT or CCP lackey. And where exactly did I lie? Everything I said has been fact-checked.

I even translated foreign videos for you. So by your logic,. even the U.S. House of Representatives. is a DPP propaganda arm now? Why is Potter King so funny? He’s clearly an introvert. If I could,. I wouldn’t just be an I-person—. I’d want to be the one you love. Introverts save words,. not intelligence. Being quiet doesn’t mean we can’t make you laugh till you cry. Of course, that commenter wasn’t a little pink. It’s just that recently,. I’ve seen some people online. seem to misunderstand introverts. And I just felt—. I need to speak up for my fellow introverts. We introverts. aren’t incapable of socializing—. we just need alone time afterward to recharge. Solitude is how introverts recharge. Extroverts get energy from interaction. Whether someone is funny or not. has nothing to do with being an I or E. Humor requires expression, observation, and emotional intelligence,. and combining that. with thinking style and creativity. It’s a result of all these things combined. It has nothing to do with being introverted or extroverted. In fact, introverts often, because of their attentiveness. and detailed thinking,. can land jokes. in the most unexpected places. Extroverts are fireworks; Introverts are snipers. One dazzles; The other hits the mark. Each has their brilliance. I think both are awesome in their own way.

=============

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zkqPs5Yt7jw

除了上述兩項挺台法案，說故事者提到，當天長達九小時的美國眾議院會議還通過了另一項他認為相當重要的法案：「停止強制活摘器官法案」。他特別強調，布萊恩·馬斯特議員在談論此案時，直接點名這一切的幕後黑手就是中國共產黨。說故事者對這種行徑表示難以置信和荒謬，認為活摘器官這種反人類罪行，對一般人而言連想都不會想，但中共政權卻做得理所當然。他以台灣屠宰雞豬仍講究人道對比，認為中國人在中共統治下活得不如雞豬。說故事者甚至提出一個令人不寒而慄的觀點，認為中共極力想攻打台灣的原因，除了戰略位置，另一個可能是因為台灣人的器官比中國大陸居民更健康。他提到中國大陸是「人體礦山」，人民飲食不安全，且經過疫情和科興疫苗的影響，許多人可能已不適合捐獻器官。他引用科興創辦人因疫苗副作用被判死刑的例子，並警告若台灣被中共佔領，歷史將被改寫，台灣人的處境將比新疆集中營更慘，並非危言聳聽，因為中共大使盧沙野曾公開說要對台灣人進行「再教育」。因此，他再次呼籲台灣人絕不能讓這種事發生，要抓住契機，淘汰親共立委，強調反共是良心問題，也是台灣人生存問題。

回應觀眾留言


影片後半段，說故事者開始回應觀眾留言，特別是「小粉紅」的惡意評論。對於被指稱是「獨立媒體，結果是官媒」，他戲稱自己被升級，並回擊留言者可能連「官媒」（器官）都不保。對於質疑其繁體中文和國語奇怪，並挑釁兩千多萬人如何讓十四億人投降的留言，他列舉了中共可能使用的核彈、無人機、航母、東風41飛彈、台積電、茶葉蛋或「美國乾爹」等方式，並針對留言者聲稱若「美國乾爹」靠近台灣就直播吃屎的賭注，提供了裴洛西訪台、上個月美國參議員代表團訪台、二月美軍軍艦穿越台灣海峽等例子，質疑對方是否要兌現承諾，並截圖存證。他也回應了稱他為「綠腦暴徒」、「民進黨側翼」的留言，反駁這種扣帽子的邏輯，並強調自己發言皆有查證，甚至翻譯國外影片，諷刺按照這種邏輯，美國眾議院也成了民進黨的宣傳部門。最後，他回應了說他「又好笑又是I人（內向者）」的留言，藉此機會為內向者發聲，解釋內向者並非不擅社交，只是需要獨處充電，並強調一個人是否幽默與內向或外向無關，而是表達能力、觀察力、情商、思維模式和創造力的結合。
================================================

Hello everyone, welcome back to this week's Pink News Special. I'm your best anti-CCP investment advisor,. Teacher Potter. Seeing diplomatic ties between Taiwan and the U.S. in our lifetime. used to feel unimaginable. It felt too far-fetched. But in recent years,. especially considering current trends,. although establishing formal ties is still difficult,. it now feels. no longer absolutely impossible. On Friday this week, the U.S. House of Representatives. passed two pro-Taiwan amendment bills:. The Taiwan Assurance Implementation Act. and the Taiwan International Solidarity Act. Truly heartwarming. We’ll talk more about this shortly. But before that—. So, the two bills passed this week in the U.S.:. The Taiwan Assurance Implementation Act. and the Taiwan International Solidarity Act—. what do they contain? The Taiwan International Solidarity Act. amends the 2019 TAIPEI Act,. stating that the U.S. supports Taiwan’s participation in international organizations. and encourages other countries. to strengthen official or unofficial ties with Taiwan. This new version,. the Taiwan International Solidarity Act,. adds clarification. that U.N. Resolution 2758. does not address Taiwan or its people. regarding representation in the U.N. or related bodies. In simpler terms,. it denounces. the CCP's long-term distortion of Resolution 2758. The U.S. is using its voice on the global stage. to inform the international community. that Taiwan is not a part of the PRC. This counters the CCP’s suppression of Taiwan.

and supports Taiwan’s participation in global organizations. The other bill passed by the U.S. Congress,. the Taiwan Assurance Implementation Act,. removes restrictions on U.S.–Taiwan official interactions,. allowing free engagement between personnel from both sides. The passage of these two bills. marks a major milestone in Taiwan-U.S. relations. We are witnessing history. Let’s take a look at what Congresswoman Ann Wagner, one of the sponsors, had to say. Ann Wagner is one of the sponsors. Did you catch that clip just now? She said the U.S. should support *this country*—. Which country? Taiwan. The little pinks’ fragile hearts are gonna break. Now U.S. officials. are publicly referring to Taiwan as a country. This shift is highly significant. I believe by now, you all understand clearly. that the U.S. Congress has moved from strategic ambiguity. to institutionalized support for Taiwan. And it’s not just one congressperson’s support—. the entire session was extensive,. but I’ll highlight two key segments for you. Another congressman,. Brian Mast, also spoke out. In the end, both bills. were passed unanimously. What Brian just said. reminded me of something from two months ago:. Former U.S. Indo-Pacific commander Davidson. publicly stated. that many U.S. regional allies see U.S.–Taiwan relations. as a benchmark for America's credibility. If Indo-Pacific influence is a core U.S. interest,. then Taiwan is a crucial cornerstone. That’s a direct quote from him. The U.S. is clearly aware. that other democracies are watching how it engages with Taiwan. Taiwan is a key geopolitical hub in the Indo-Pacific.

Its location is strategic,. seen as the first line of democratic defense. If the U.S. were to abandon Taiwan,. not only would it impact U.S. national security,. it would also be indefensible to its allies. Taiwan’s interests are now. equivalent to America’s. The CCP's threats to Taiwan,. its alliances with Russia and North Korea,. are becoming intolerable for the U.S. Strategic ambiguity is no longer sustainable; they must shift to strategic clarity. Of course, formal Taiwan–U.S. ties in the short term. are something I hope for,. but I won’t jump to conclusions. Still, we can see clearly. that Taiwan-U.S. relations have changed. Even without formal ties,. they’re moving toward a quasi-diplomatic relationship. It’s just that formal procedures take time. Even without formal recognition,. substantively, we’re already beyond what normal ties would bring. However, if the CCP invades Taiwan militarily. or collapses from an internal political crisis,. then I think. formal diplomatic ties would be greatly accelerated. In any case,. we Taiwanese must seize this moment. Do not sell ourselves short. As for those pro-CCP KMT legislators,. this is our homework as Taiwanese—. to recall and remove them. We must show this to the world as well. Let’s keep fighting together. This session of the U.S. House of Representatives. was live-streamed for quite a long time—. a full nine hours. Besides the two bills we mentioned earlier,. another bill was also passed. Personally, I think it's quite important too,.

although I noticed that in Taiwanese news media,. this part doesn’t seem to be widely reported. But maybe I just missed it. Anyway, I’ve put it together here for you. That bill is—. the Stop Forced Organ Harvesting Act. And when Congressman Brian spoke about it,. he specifically called out the Chinese Communist Party,. because the CCP is behind it all. Before talking about this issue,. he expressed disbelief that in today’s world,. this is still happening—. it's absolutely absurd. He said it’s incredible. that we even need to speak out. against something like this. Because normal people. would never even think. of doing such a thing. But the CCP government actually would. Let’s take a look at that clip. The CCP’s live organ harvesting. actually needs to be outlawed through legislation. Most people wouldn’t even think of doing such a thing,. but for the Communist Party,. this crime against humanity. is carried out as naturally as breathing. Here in Taiwan, even when slaughtering pigs or chickens,. we talk about doing it humanely. But people in China under the CCP. live worse than pigs or chickens. I believe one of the reasons the CCP is so determined to invade Taiwan. is not just its strategic location—. another reason is that right now,. Taiwanese organs. are healthier than those of mainlanders. Everyone knows that people in the PRC are "human mines," fed with toxic food and harsh chemicals. And during the pandemic,. many in China got the Sinovac vaccine—.

they’re probably no longer viable donors. The Sinovac founder who was once praised. as a national hero by the CCP,. was later sentenced to death. because of the vaccine’s severe side effects. So if the CCP successfully invades Taiwan,. not only will history be rewritten,. but Taiwanese people. will live worse than those in Xinjiang camps. This isn’t fearmongering—. even CCP ambassador Lu Shaye said it:. After taking Taiwan,. the people must be "re-educated." So we must never let this happen. Let’s seize Taiwan’s current momentum,. get rid of pro-CCP legislators. Opposing the CCP is a matter of conscience. and the survival of Taiwanese people. Let’s all work together in Phase 3! Come on, fist bump! Let’s go! Now in the second half of this video,. let’s take a look at some funny hate comments. “Thought it was independent media, turns out it’s state media.”. In the eyes of little pinks,. I’ve apparently been upgraded to the level of state media, huh? But I’m not state media—. You’re more likely to be missing your *state media*— I mean, your organs. Why do your traditional Chinese and Mandarin sound so ridiculous? How can 1.4 billion people surrender to just 20 million of you? With what? With nuclear bombs? Drones? Aircraft carriers? DF-41 missiles? TSMC or tea eggs? Or your American godfather? If your American godfather can get near Taiwan,. I'll livestream myself eating shit. If they can’t get close to Taiwan,.

then will *you* eat shit? Glad I read your comment all the way through. Even though it started with a bunch of crap,. just remember what you said at the end—. You said if the U.S. gets close to Taiwan,. you’ll eat shit on livestream. Well then, little pink,. go ahead and book a livestream time with me. Didn’t Pelosi already visit Taiwan? Or if that’s too long ago for you—. A U.S. Senate delegation came just last month. Isn’t that your so-called American godfather? Don’t tell me now. that setting foot in Taiwan doesn’t count. And what about February, when U.S. warships passed through the Taiwan Strait? Does that count as “near Taiwan”? You little pink named “BoogerBooger”—. I took a screenshot. Don’t hide now. Come out and keep your promise. No one even asked you to bet with poop in the first place. But why do little pinks always love making that the wager? I seriously suspect—. you secretly wanted to eat it anyway. Alright then, dream granted. Dear Booger bro,. get ready and start eating. LOL, the green-brained thugs are here again. I suggest everyone unsubscribe ASAP. Just another DPP shill spreading lies and propaganda. You can’t even win against someone you call “green-brained.”. So aren’t you even more brainless? How pitiful. All you know is slinging mud. Why is it that being anti-CCP. makes someone a DPP lackey? Then if you’re pro-CCP,. you must be a KMT or CCP lackey. And where exactly did I lie? Everything I said has been fact-checked.

I even translated foreign videos for you. So by your logic,. even the U.S. House of Representatives. is a DPP propaganda arm now? Why is Potter King so funny? He’s clearly an introvert. If I could,. I wouldn’t just be an I-person—. I’d want to be the one you love. Introverts save words,. not intelligence. Being quiet doesn’t mean we can’t make you laugh till you cry. Of course, that commenter wasn’t a little pink. It’s just that recently,. I’ve seen some people online. seem to misunderstand introverts. And I just felt—. I need to speak up for my fellow introverts. We introverts. aren’t incapable of socializing—. we just need alone time afterward to recharge. Solitude is how introverts recharge. Extroverts get energy from interaction. Whether someone is funny or not. has nothing to do with being an I or E. Humor requires expression, observation, and emotional intelligence,. and combining that. with thinking style and creativity. It’s a result of all these things combined. It has nothing to do with being introverted or extroverted. In fact, introverts often, because of their attentiveness. and detailed thinking,. can land jokes. in the most unexpected places. Extroverts are fireworks; Introverts are snipers. One dazzles; The other hits the mark. Each has their brilliance. I think both are awesome in their own way.
